title: Spicy Tofu Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with spicy tofu and served with a side of sweet chili sauce. Perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a bowl, mix together crumbled tofu, cumin, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour, cornmeal, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the tofu mixture and mix until just combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
Serve hot with a side of sweet chili sauce for dipping.
